description: Complete a full order-to-invoice sales cycle in Apache OFBiz. Starting from the Order Manager, create a new Sales Order for customer 'AcctBuyer' using the 'OFBiz E-Commerce Store' product store. Add 3 units of 'Round Gizmo' (GZ-2644) at $38.40 each and 2 units of 'Giant Widget' (WG-9943) at $440.00 each. Approve the order. Once the order is approved, navigate to the order view and use the 'Create Invoice' action to generate a Sales Invoice from this order. Then navigate to the Accounting module, find the newly created invoice, and set its status to 'Approved'. The task is complete when both the sales order and its corresponding invoice are in 'Approved' status.
